q̃ Reys no lengrr for ço layn
pͭ ze do him no uirmino
pͭ ze do him no winigo
and weie h̾itte fro w̾ w̾ets
hie was cecte ou Ick side
Wyth copus couert pay honithemis
Wyth copus conert pay honithemis
wzte ic uay hade bͦene uncowthe men
Enyn dewus to payre fete
Euyndowus to payre fete
hẽ hies gode
I waine zo frekes be zo bold
